summary: Completed frontend testing of Firebase Auth bypass for preview/development environment. All protected routes accessible without login. Mock user identity correctly set.
passed_tests: Auth bypass activates in preview environment (preview.emergentagent.com)
Mock user identity correctly set: uid=dev-user, email=test@izlek.dev, username=isa
localStorage persists mock user: userId=dev-user, userName=isa
Login page redirects to protected route when auth bypass active
Register page redirects to protected route when auth bypass active
Leaderboard page accessible with auth bypass
Friends page accessible with auth bypass
Notifications page accessible with auth bypass
Profile page accessible with auth bypass - shows mock user email (test@izlek.dev)
Rooms page accessible with auth bypass
ProtectedRoute component correctly allows access when authBypassEnabled=true
Console logs show bypass reason: 'DEVELOPMENT/PREVIEW MODE: Mock authentication aktif (missing-config)'
No blank pages or auth errors on protected routes
Production regression check: bypass only active in preview/development environments
critical_code_review_comments: Auth bypass implementation is well-designed with proper environment detection
isDevelopmentOrPreviewEnvironment() correctly checks localhost, 127.0.0.1, and preview.emergentagent.com
Production auth flow is protected - bypass only activates in dev/preview environments
Mock user credentials match requirements: uid=dev-user, email=test@izlek.dev, username=isa
seed_data_creation: None required - mock user is hardcoded in AuthContext.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Firebase Auth bypass is working correctly in preview environment. All protected routes (dashboard, leaderboard, friends, notifications, profile, rooms) are accessible without real login. The mock user (dev-user/test@izlek.dev/isa) is automatically authenticated. Backend API calls return 404 errors because the mock user has no data in the database, but this is expected behavior for UI testing purposes.
mocked_api_note: MOCKED: Firebase Authentication is bypassed in preview/development environment with mock user (uid=dev-user, email=test@izlek.dev, username=isa). Production auth flow is NOT affected.
